_schema: One JSON object per line — the code agent's structured cycle log (append-only). Fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD), backlog_id (int, from BACKLOG.md), item (one line), files (list of repo-relative paths changed), gates ({import:bool, verify_storyboard:bool, verify:bool, code_review:bool, build:bool|null}), branch (autoimprove/YYYY-MM-DD-slug), decision (main|pr|discarded|reverted — 'main' = gated commit shipped straight to main, the default since 2026-07-06; 'pr' = draft-PR fallback for changes the gate could not fully verify), pr (commit sha, PR URL, or null), notes (why discarded/reverted / operator follow-up). The agent skips any line containing _schema.
note: Seed line. Real cycles are appended below by the code agent.

discovered 2026-07-06 (fork exhaustion self-recovered silently); reading is two cheap forks (sysctl kern.maxproc + ps -A), fails closed to None on any error so a broken reading can't crash /health or flip status; verify_health grew 12->17 checks (mocked degraded/ok/threshold-boundary + real sysctl/ps path); /verify on scratch port 7274 + throwaway sqlite showed a real reading (44.6%); code-review: manual diff-scoped pass (small 2-file diff), no findings, confirmed no clash with the separate /api/health route; deployed via launchctl kickstart, post-restart /health on :7070 confirms status ok with system.processes populated (45.1%); sha=4bdb1e5

item: GET /oauth-status now finishes the identity bind a failed consent left undone: an unbound channel is routed through notify.mark_connected with a freshly fetched identity instead of a hand-rolled status-only flip
notes: HIGH-caution oauth file, isolated commit + new regression checks. Defect: /oauth-status is the documented repair when a consent saved a good token but its mark_connected commit failed (the callback page AND app/reconnect.py:174 both send the operator here), yet the probe only set oauth_status -- leaving exactly the state it was meant to repair half-done: a working token with NO bound YouTube identity, so Channels.tsx (yt_channel_title || name) kept rendering the stale name and the next re-consent had no expected_channel_id for verify_grant's wrong-account check. Fix routes an *unbound* channel through the same mark_connected choke point a successful consent uses; an already-bound channel keeps the cheap in-place flip on purpose (the dashboard polls this endpoint every 2.5s while a reconnect is in flight and channels().list costs a quota unit per tick -- proven by a test asserting zero identity calls). Binding is best-effort: get_service already proved the token refreshes, so a channels().list blip logs a warning and falls through to the plain flip rather than turning a healthy probe into a dead-channel flip; an identity with no channel id binds nothing rather than writing nulls over the row. Full suite green, none decreased: oauth_redirect 54->64, storyboard 40, growth 25, health 17, issues 63, notify 68, publish 30, quota 37, reconnect 47, topic_playlist 32 (total 413->423). /verify: the 10 new checks drive the real GET /oauth-status route (TestClient + real router/session, only get_service/fetch_identity stubbed) across the unbound repair, the zero-quota bound poll, a failing identity lookup, an account with no channel, and the unchanged dead-token mark_dead_committed path. Negative check: with app/routers/channels.py stashed the suite fails at 'an unbound channel gets its identity bound through mark_connected' -- the test reproduces the defect. code-review (manual): bound-channel behavior byte-identical; the pre-existing 'a commit failure inside the try lands in mark_dead_committed' path is untouched (not introduced, left out of scope); zero high-confidence findings. Post-deploy (launchctl kickstart): /health 200 status:ok (same as before), dashboard 200 authed, and the changed endpoint driven live -- GET /api/channels/{1,2}/oauth-status both returned {"oauth_status":"connected","error":null} with identities preserved (ch1 UCSH53DmossqLTUZdh2PE1Hg 'Owera Software', ch2 UCGHkzi8k9Oma6IiMjQuDnbA 'Rodrigo Recio'), i.e. both took the zero-quota bound path. sha=602ed71
